name: Raspberry Yogurt Pie2
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the raspberries and reserve the juice.
2. Add enough water to the juice to measure 2/3 cup.
3. In a saucepan, combine the sugar and gelatin; add the reserved liquid.
4. Heat and stir until the gelatin and sugar dissolve. Remove from heat.
5. Gradually stir in the yogurt and sour cream; mix well.
6. Stir in the raspberries.
7. Pour into the crust.
8. Chill until set, about 4 hours.
9. Garnish with whipped topping as desired.
